case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1019 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 06.03.2025 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. This petition was presented in the office on 08.07.2024 since then no efforts have been made by the petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court of hearing. The conduct of the petitioners and their Counsel reflects that they are not interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
